results.title: “Halloween: The Game” Single Player Trailer
results.description: A while back came word of Illfonic, Gun Interactive, Compass International Pictures and Further Front’s new video game based on the “Halloween” film franchise. The title, made in Unreal Engine 5, is a big ol’ tribute to John Carpenter’s 1978 original film, and the action takes place in Haddonfield on that night. The game boasts [...] The post “Halloween: The Game” Single Player Trailer appeared first on Dark Horizons .
